hero.art_prompt: Ananya, a 24 year old Indian graduate woman in a modest kurti, warm and thoughtful, reading literature with a laptop and books at home, aspirational literary mood.

panels.narration: Ananya loved literature and the craft of language.
panels.img_prompt: Ananya, 24, happily reading a book with a laptop nearby at home, warm thoughtful, tidy room with books.

panels.narration: But turning that love into a career needed a master's.
panels.dialogue: How do I teach or write?
panels.img_prompt: Ananya looking thoughtful, wondering how to build a career in English, books and a laptop around her, modest room.

panels.narration: Then she found an MA in English, online.
panels.img_prompt: Ananya's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing an MA in English, warm hopeful glow, books nearby.

panels.narration: She enrolled and immersed in literature.
panels.img_prompt: Ananya confidently starting her first MA English lesson on a laptop, open book and notebook beside her, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MA In English
points: Study literature, linguistics, literary theory and academic writing in depth.
A strong path to teaching, content, editing, civil services and research.
Wonderfully affordable: ₹45,000 for the full 2-year MA (₹22,500/year), with 0% interest EMI available.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MA in English, recognised for jobs and further study.

testimonials.name: Ananya Iyer
testimonials.quote: I loved literature. This MA turned that love into a real path toward teaching.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: I studied literature deeply from home, around my other responsibilities.

testimonials.name: Arun Nair
testimonials.quote: So affordable. The small monthly EMI made a master's in English easy to start.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised MA in English got me into the teaching role I always wanted.

facts.v: Literature, linguistics, literary theory, academic writing
Teaching, content, editing, civil services, research
UGC-entitled online MA, NAAC A++ accredited
